# Coverage: FX

<!-- GENERATED by `make qa-matrix` — do not edit by hand. -->
<!-- Rows come from docs/qa/invariants/11-fx.md; the Covered-by column is
     computed from `// covers:` annotations in the test suite. -->

**4 / 4** invariants in this zone have at least one covering test.

| ID | Invariant | Covered by |
|----|-----------|------------|
| INV-FX-01 | Passthrough: `convert` returns the amount unchanged with `rate=1` and `ok=true`, consulting **no rate at all**, when the currency is empty, equals the reporting currency, or multi-currency is off. A rate present in the table for that currency must not leak into any of these branches — the single-currency / native-is-reporting path can never fail a conversion | `backend/internal/repo/fx_converter_test.go` |
| INV-FX-02 | Carry-forward: a foreign amount converts at native × the **latest manual rate at or before its month** (`latestAtOrBefore`), never a future one. With rates at two months, a month between them takes the earlier rate; a month with no later rate carries the last known one forward — the rate is never interpolated or pulled forward from the future | `backend/internal/repo/fx_converter_test.go` |
| INV-FX-03 | Missing surfaced, not zeroed: a foreign amount with no rate at or before its month is unconvertible — `convert` returns `ok=false` and zeroes its outputs, so the engine excludes the position/flow and records a `missingFxEntry` rather than counting it. The amount is **never returned at face value (1:1)**, which would silently misstate net worth | `backend/internal/repo/fx_converter_test.go` |
| INV-FX-04 | Audit gate: `foreign()` is true exactly when multi-currency is on and the currency is neither empty nor the reporting currency. This predicate gates `recordRate`, so `fx_rates_used` carries an audit row for — and only for — a genuinely converted currency (no spurious rate-1 row for the reporting currency, no row when multi is off) | `backend/internal/repo/fx_converter_test.go` |
